title: custom-metadata-and-settings-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the custom-metadata-and-settings-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

scenario_summary.description: Example from AGENT.md: "feature flag registry for 30 Apex classes; per-environment values; production reads must be fast" Required column: 'design'.
scenario_summary.example: "feature flag registry for 30 Apex classes; per-environment values; production reads must be fast"

expected_record_count.description: Example from AGENT.md: integer — approximate live record count Required column: 'design'.

environment_scoped.description: Example from AGENT.md: `true` if values vary per sandbox/prod (tilts to CMT) Required column: 'design'.
